data.title: Bitcoin ETFs lost $225M in 1 day amid US-Iran tensions as Bitcoin hit below $65K. BlackRock's IBIT primarily fueled the outflow. Markets closed positive overall.
data.description: Amid renewed tensions between the US and Iran, Bitcoin experienced a brief drop below $65,000, accompanied by a decline in stock prices. BlackRock's IBIT was prominent in overseeing the market exit during this period. However, despite these fluctuations, the week ultimately ended positively, with overall gains in the market.

data.title: IFL criticizes India's GitHub takedown of BitChat, deems it unconstitutional. Order to remove Jack Dorsey's repositories violates free speech.
data.description: An organization advocating for digital rights has stated that India's directive to take down Jack Dorsey's BitChat repositories from GitHub goes beyond the government's legal jurisdiction and poses a threat to freedom of expression.

data.title: Generational Group Advises Rodd Roofing in Its Sale to Royalty Roofing, a Portfolio Company of Six Pillars Partners
data.description: Generational Group recently facilitated the sale of Rodd Roofing to Royalty Roofing, a company under Six Pillars Partners. This transaction was finalized on June 30, 2026. Rodd Roofing, based in St. Johnsbury, Vermont, is a long-standing family-owned roofing business that has been in operation for four generations. They focus on providing roofing services for both residential and commercial properties, specializing in new constructions and reroofing projects.

data.title: Geospace Technologies Schedules Third Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: Geospace Technologies (NASDAQ: GEOS) disclosed plans to unveil its third-quarter financial figures for 2026 on August 6, 2026, following the market's closure. They have arranged a conference call for August 7, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (9:00 a.m. Central). This event, the Geospace Technologies Third Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call, will be accessible live via phone.

data.description: The latest figures show that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The economy also added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 3% increase following the positive job report. Overall, this data indicates a strong and growing economy with a promising outlook for the future.

data.title: Generational Group Advises Trusted Family Foundation, LLC in its Sale to Faithful Family Foundation, LLC
data.description: Generational Group, a top mergers and acquisitions advisory firm for privately held businesses, has successfully facilitated the sale of Trusted Family Foundation, LLC to Faithful Family Foundation, LLC. This transaction was finalized on July 9, 2026. Based in Cedar Hill, Texas, Trusted Family Foundation, LLC operates as a Child Placement Agency, committed to offering secure and nurturing settings for children in foster care. Their mission includes enhancing families and communities through compassion and care.
